reviews.review_title: A DEMOnstration of the graphics only.
reviews.review_description: It's not a demo like you would think. Its a DEMOnstration of the atmosphere and graphics .. there is no interacting with anything and no words.. what I will say is I really enjoyed the graphics and scenery! Very futuristic and dystopian. i'm not even sure how I found this originally. after watching it i went back in the app store to look for it and had to type in exactly, letter for letter, the entire title. I REALLY hope there's a game out or in the works!
this demo is so intresting I really wanna see more please come out with some news for this demo😭😭😭
from the maker of lofi and this is actually amazing considering it's on quest.

The graphic is amazing,  but there's not interaction with the ambient improve on this 
And it will be better. But For what I have seen 
It work it

How are you supposed to “escape this prison” when you are unable to move or interact with anything. The video on app page Is literally all that I see.  How the heck do play the game if it is just a continual loop that you see. I want to give this a 5 star because the graphics are amazing.

Absolutely jaw-droppingly stunning graphics.
But don't let the description fool you!
You'll do none of the stuff mentioned: 
you interact with NOTHING.
Instead, what this is, 
is a handful of scenes you can't move in.
But you CAN turn around in 360° and check everything out.
Hopefully a full "Agency" game will eventually come to Quest 2.
Because with graphics like these and an absolutely mindblowing premise --
even though it's a direct copy of "Bladerunner" -- it would be an INSTANT hit!
🙂👍🏻
Really cool Tech Demo, to the developers-Yes Please, I would love to play a game in this universe.
I hope this be made into a actual game for the meta quest 3. up there with the upcoming  great AAA vr titles Batman Arkham shadow and metro awakening.

don’t think a lot of these reviewers get that this is a tech demo. YOU ARENT SUPPOSED TO BE ABLE TO DO ANYTHING. 
Otherwise, the graphics are great! Can’t wait to see the full project!

Don't let your kids watch this. Or play this. Or ever even think about it.
The Summer of Free Games continues with a tech demo, which I didn't realize was a tech demo on account of the fact that the description listed all of these things you wouldn't be able to do, but didn't say "You can't do these yet, but maybe someday when we finish this game you will be able to." And because I don't read the download page very carefully. So all this is right now is a chance for you to be afraid. VERY afraid. The Uncanny Valley has spilled out ALL OVER this tech demo, and every moment you will fear that SOMETHING is going to jump out and swallow your soul. SWALLOW YOUR SOUL!!! And if that's what they were going for, then they NAILED it. But since you can't do anything, I would argue that this is a STYLE demo, and not actually a TECH demo. But I digress. The Style is truly impressive, and as terrifying as it is... I kinda want to see more.
I did this so you don't have to, but if you want to feel the fear for yourself, it's free, so put on a diaper and give it a go. GAME ON, MY FRIENDS! And I will see you in the FUTURE- on StoneToaster Gaming.
I strongly urge the developers to take this work forward. You would make all science fiction fans happy and in particular Blade Runner fans 😉 👍🏻

Just s few issues I met:
- The arms are stuck in the air, they are not following my rotation.
- Framerate terribe (Quest1, but not sure how it got through oculus review).
- the scenery isn't that good quality and lighting is baked with poor settings.
- I wouldn't consider putting a few models and arms in the scene a tech demo. Proof of concept maybe, if it would run with full framerate, or if would look good.

The graphics are great, but there's literally nothing to do.
So if you like watching a few meaningless scenes over and over, this "game" is for you.
This is now being made into a real game for the psvr2 called Low Fi! I’m very exited to see what it will be like.
Phenomenal…. Can’t wait for the project!!!
How is this a applab the graphics are amazing like wow

A tiny appetizer. As someone preorder and therefore having access to the Low-Fi Beta, this isn't too spectacular. Although that it runs purely on Oculus Quest is pretty neat. 
I can't wait to either Agency and Low-Fi are finished.

Great graphics for quest, but building a game around it will take more processing power for handling interaction, AI, movement, collision, etc. So in the end the final product might look totally differnt. Also game development takes tme, maybe in two years we might see some real game if they have the funding and decide to go the quest route. Also they have to finish Low-Fi first 😉
It works fine but I'm curious what this is going to be.

Offering several scenes your stationary in there isn't gameplay here but as a visual presentation it looks stunning running on my Oculus Quest 2. The developer has done some really great tricks to get everything running so smoothly and I think if your a VR gamer, or a developer you should take a look at what has been accomplished here as it stands as a truly fantastic technical demonstration.
